text: Aaj hospital ka bill dekh kar mera dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai. Pehle hi kisan hokar fasal kharab hui, phir kirana shop doob gayi, aur ab bachi-kuchi jama-poonji bhi chali gayi toh main bilkul flood ho gaya hoon. Is waqt main koi sahukar ka karz ya aage ka raasta nahi soch pa raha, bas ek gehra sadma mehsus ho raha hai.

Neighborhood shame ki wajah se pehle hi gaon mein sar jhuka kar chalta tha, par is medical bill ne toh mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi purane taane goonj rahe hain aur main bas ek kone mein baith kar roye ja raha hoon. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega aur main sab khatam kar loon.

Medical bill bharne ke baad jab bank balance zero dekha, toh mere hosh ud gaye aur main bas sunn hokar khet ki meid par baitha raha. Debt spiral itna gehra hai ki ab mujhe saans lena bhi bhari lag raha hai aur rone ka control nahi kar pa raha. Is waqt main koi kisan credit card ya EMI ke baare mein soch hi nahi sakta, bas ye darr mujhe duba raha hai.

Kirana shop ke loss ke baad parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ka jo pressure tha, aaj is hospital bill ne usse ek extreme breakdown mein badal diya hai. Main kuch bhi logically nahi soch pa raha, bas aankhon ke aage andhera aa raha hai aur dimaag blank ho gaya hai. Mujhe lag raha hai ki main sabka gunehgaar hoon aur ye flood of emotions mujhe kuch karne hi nahi de raha.

Sarkari naukri toh mili nahi, aur ab is medical bill ne meri bachi-kuchi himmat bhi saaf kar di hai, main poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon. Moneylender ka darr toh door ki baat hai, mujhe ab apna wajood hi ek bojh lag raha hai aur dimaag mein koi rasta nahi dikh raha. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas ek gehra sannata hai jo mujhe andar se kha raha hai.
